name: B3TR Beach
desc: Join verified beach, river, and park cleanups and earn B3TR for real-world environmental impact.

name: ReUse
desc: Re-Use is a circular fashion dApp that rewards people for buying second-hand clothing. Users upload proof of their second-hand purchase and can earn rewards through the VeBetterDAO ecosystem. The purpose of Re-Use is to reduce textile waste, promote reuse, and make sustainable fashion choices measurable and rewarding.

name: V3Tax
desc: Smart Scan for connected wallets and tax dashboard for purchased reports.

name: VaultX
desc: VaultX: Instant Liquidity for your NFTs

name: Goatz Club NFT
desc: A NFT project rooted on VeChain, featuring Alpha Goatz, Smart Goatz, Female Goatz and the wider Goatz Club ecosystem.

name: MVA Swap
desc: MVA native DEX on VeChain. Trade VET/MVA, earn LP fees, support the ecosystem.

name: GoPaperoo!
desc: GoPaperoo!, created under the leadership of GoPer, is a fun and sustainability-driven app that encourages users to skip ATM receipts and help protect trees by reducing unnecessary paper waste.

name: BIKADEMY
desc: Ride your bike, earn $B3TR. Bikademy is a cycle-to-earn app that rewards real-world cycling. Track your rides, compete in global Challenges, and get rewarded.

name: WoV Marketplace
desc: The first gas-free, green NFT platform built on the VeChain blockchain
